hero.badge: 50 Credits Free — No Credit Card Required
hero.subheadline: Node-based canvas for creative teams to generate, compare, and export campaign-ready image variants at scale.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything you need for visual AI workflows
features.subheadline: A powerful node-based canvas with built-in AI models, smart agents, and everything your creative team needs to produce stunning image variants.

canvas.title: Node-Based Canvas
canvas.desc: Drag-and-drop visual editor. Connect Image, Text, Prompt, and AI Image nodes to build custom AI workflows. No code needed.

models.title: 9+ AI Models
models.desc: Access FLUX.2, Gemini, GPT-5 Image and more through OpenRouter. Pick the perfect model for every task.

agents.title: Smart Agents
agents.desc: Automate batch operations with intelligent agents that analyze, plan, and execute across multiple nodes. Like having an AI assistant on your canvas.

compare.title: Visual Compare
compare.desc: Side-by-side comparison of generated variants. Pick the best output instantly.

export.title: One-Click Export
export.desc: Download as PNG or ZIP. Ready for your social media, ads, and campaigns.

selfhosted.title: Self-Hosted
selfhosted.desc: Run on your infrastructure. Your images, your data, your control. Full data privacy.

transform.title: Transform & Edit
transform.desc: Background removal, upscaling, style transfer, crop & resize — all as canvas nodes.

credits.title: Credit-Based Pricing
credits.desc: Pay only for what you use. 50 free credits to start, then top up as needed.

how.label: How it Works
how.headline: From idea to campaign images in minutes
how.subheadline: Four simple steps to generate professional AI-powered image variants at scale.

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop your brand assets and reference images onto the canvas.

step2.title: Connect
step2.desc: Build your workflow with nodes: add prompts, choose AI models, set parameters.

step3.title: Generate
step3.desc: Let AI create variants. Agents can batch-process hundreds of images.

step4.title: Export
step4.desc: Compare, select, and download your campaign-ready images.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple, credit-based pricing
pricing.subheadline: Pay only for what you use. Start free, scale as you grow.
pricing.info: 1 Credit ≈ 1 AI Image Generation · Top-up anytime

footer.tagline: The visual AI workspace for creative teams.
